name: python3-fastjsonschema
title: python3-fastjsonschema
summary: validation of JSON documents by JSON schema drafts 04/06/07
description:
validation of JSON documents by JSON schema drafts 04/06/07
Fastjsonschema implements validation of JSON documents by JSON schema.
.
The library implements JSON schema drafts 04, 06 and 07.
.
The main purpose is to have a really fast implementation.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-fastjsonschema because validation of JSON documents by JSON schema drafts 04/06/07.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-fastjsonschema as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-fastjsonschema with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-fastjsonschema --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
